description: Use this API to remove the two-terminal dc line model from a specified two-terminal dc line. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.2.0. ierr = ttdclmod_remove(dc)

parameters.name: dc
parameters.description: Quoted name of the two-terminal dc line for which the model is to be removed; if an unquoted integer value is specified, the api converts it to a left-justified name. (input; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: no model at this dc line.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
